speaker: [player]
text: I think we should do it. Worst case it doesn't work and it's a good story.

speaker: Dirtus
text: YES. THE NEW ONE GETS IT. [player] has WORM COURAGE.

speaker: Mawla
text: For the record I think this is a bad idea. Also for the record I'll be there.

speaker: Grubwin
text: I hate all of you. I'll bring snacks.
